name: Garth Brooks
bio: Garth Brooks' catalog continues to earn because his biggest country songs remain deeply embedded in American singalong and live-event culture.
notable_for: Blockbuster country albums and songs with unusually durable mass familiarity.
career_highlight: No Fences remains one of the defining modern country catalog albums.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Garth Brooks's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Garth Brooks's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
